title: Optimizer: experiments-per-cycle hardcoded to 1, no CLI/UI control

No CLI flag or UI control exists to raise it; operators want 5-10 candidates/cycle for the optimizer to compare. Fix: add experiments_per_cycle to AutoOptimizerConfig (serde default), read it in both build_cycle_config sites, add CLI --experiments-per-cycle override, add a UI number input. Cycle already validates <=64.
close_reason: Merged as PR #884 — experiments_per_cycle (default 5) + CLI + UI; reachability verified

Use Ollama response_format json_schema on /api/chat to grammar-constrain output. Apply to all providers where safe. Verify GGUF tokenizer supports constrained sampling.

title: Fix /api/scenarios 400 on single-value tags/exclude_tags params
description:
The /api/scenarios list endpoint returns HTTP 400 when tags or exclude_tags contains exactly one value. serde_urlencoded (used by axum Query extractor) fails to deserialize a single-occurrence key (?tags=a) into Vec<String> — it expects either repeated keys (?tags=a&tags=b) or nothing.

Root cause: ListParams uses Vec<String> for tags/exclude_tags without a deserializer that handles the single-value case.

Fix: Add a string_or_vec custom deserializer in crates/xvision-dashboard/src/routes/scenarios.rs that accepts both a bare string and a sequence, and annotate both fields with #[serde(default, deserialize_with = 'string_or_vec')].

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /api/scenarios?exclude_tags=source:autooptimizer returns 200
- GET /api/scenarios?tags=source:autooptimizer returns 200
- GET /api/scenarios?tags=a&tags=b still works (two values)
- GET /api/scenarios (no tag params) still returns 200
close_reason: Fixed in PR #854: string_or_vec deserializer added to ListParams.tags and ListParams.exclude_tags

title: Fix: api_key_set=false for no-auth providers (ollama/llama-cpp/vllm)
description: row_from_entry in providers.rs returns api_key_set=false when api_key_env is empty, which is correct for OpenAI-compat but wrong for no-auth kinds (Ollama, LlamaCpp, Vllm). entry_has_key already has the right logic but is not used in row_from_entry. Fix: replace the manual api_key_set computation with entry_has_key(entry, secrets). Add parity test for the Ollama no-auth case.
acceptance_criteria: api_key_set=true for ollama provider with empty api_key_env in /api/settings/providers response; parity test covers the no-auth case
close_reason: Fixed: row_from_entry now uses entry_has_key() — api_key_set=true for Ollama/LlamaCpp/Vllm with empty api_key_env. Added parity test. All 7 backend tests + 8 frontend tests pass.

Author the host-agnostic subgraph.yaml + mappings against the 6 deployed contracts (IdentityRegistry, ReputationRegistry, ValidationRegistry, ListingRegistry, Marketplace, EvalAttestationRegistry) to unblock the real MarketplaceData impl (runbook §3.2 / C7).
close_reason: Subgraph authored (manifest + ABIs + mappings + matchstick tests); PR #907. codegen/build/test all green. Deploy-to-host is operator step §2.9.

title: Optimizer B22: handle MAX_WINDOW_DAYS=120 as a breaking change for existing autooptimizer.toml
description: B22 (PR #902) added a hard cap of MAX_WINDOW_DAYS=120 in AutoOptimizerConfig::validate() covering day_window, baseline_untouched_window, and regime windows. Any existing operator autooptimizer.toml with a >120-day window now fails validation (this is the OOM-prone span the cap intentionally blocks). Decide: (a) document in MANUAL.md / dashboard wiki + add a migration note, and/or (b) make the cap a named config field so power users can opt into larger windows with explicit acknowledgement. Shipped example + seed templates were already narrowed to ~90 days in PR #902.

title: Optimizer B17/B6: extend kind-rotation + filter domain-constraint hints to the tournament path
description: B6 (per-retry mutation-kind rotation) and B17 (filter-path domain-constraint hints, e.g. window ops >=1, within_pct >0) were fixed only on the non-tournament Mutator::propose path. When config.tournament_enabled=true the cycle uses tournament.rs (build_proposal_user) which constructs its own prompt and never reaches build_user_payload, so neither fix applies there. Mirror both fixes into the tournament proposer. Source: PR #902 wiring verification (B17 verdict=partial).

title: fix(autooptimizer): filter not rendered in program_view markdown, causing stale_filter_baseline rejections
description: program_view::to_markdown renders Manifest, Agents, Mechanical params, Risk config — but NOT the Filter. The LLM sees filter paths via the filter_section in the mutator prompt but cannot see the filter's full current state in the main program view. This causes the LLM to propose wrong 'before' values (especially for max_wakeups_per_day when null), triggering stale_filter_baseline validation errors. Fix: add a Filter section to to_markdown_with_resolved_prompts (informational only; from_markdown already clones base.filter and doesn't need to change).
close_reason: Closed

title: fix(autooptimizer): --budget never fires with unpriced providers (Ollama); no startup guard
description: When an unpriced provider like Ollama is used, load_metering_catalogs returns empty and spent_usd stays 0.0 forever. BudgetCappedPaperTester checks 'spent >= budget_usd' which never fires. The session until_budget mode checks 'cum_cost_usd >= budget' which also never fires, causing the session loop to run indefinitely. Need: startup error when --budget is specified and the provider has no catalog pricing.
close_reason: Closed

title: Wire RandomDirection into eval BaselinesReport and clean up ab-compare stale refs
description: RandomDirection baseline exists in xvision-eval default_v1_set() but is not surfaced in the eval metrics BaselinesReport (bar_baselines.rs only has 4 baselines). Need to: (1) add random_direction to BaselinesReport/RelativeTo in bar_baselines.rs and run.rs, implement the bar-slice computation, wire into build_baselines_report in backtest.rs; (2) remove ab-compare from cli_surface_snapshot.json (lines 29, 1427) since the verb is already deleted from lib.rs.
close_reason: Wired RandomDirection into eval BaselinesReport as the fifth baseline. Removed stale ab-compare entries from cli_surface_snapshot.json. Committed ff296a1.

title: Trader prompt/risk-config desync: prompt text embeds stale risk params (8.0 vs actual 2.0)
description: QA 2026-06-08 secondary finding: the BTC trader's system-prompt text hand-embeds 'Parameters: ... stop_loss_atr_multiple: 8.0' while the typed risk config had 2.0 — they drift independently. When the optimizer mutates risk.* params the prompt still lies about them. Systematic fix: inject the live risk config into the trader prompt at execution time instead of relying on hand-written param text (per feedback_systematic_over_model_specific). Separate subsystem (agent execution prompt assembly) from the mutator lever-diversity fix; tracked as follow-up to xvision-avg.

title: Optimizer: random-baseline edge metric (edge_over_random/parent_edge/edge_delta)
description: Per-cycle informational (non-blocking) columns: edge_over_random=child_sharpe-random_baseline_sharpe; parent_edge=parent_sharpe-random_baseline_sharpe; edge_delta=edge_over_random-parent_edge. Strategy-aware random LONG/FLAT agent (no SHORT for long-only), fixed-seed, cached once per training window. Sits alongside delta_day/delta_holdout/verdict gate records.
close_reason: Merged as PR #882 — random-baseline edge metric (edge_over_random/parent_edge/edge_delta)

title: 'Since you were last here' delta subtitle on home header

title: Reconcile: live runs in Active tasks vs separate LiveStrategiesSection
description: Structural: spec P2 folds live/paper runs INTO Active tasks; Control Tower S2 shipped a separate always-green LiveStrategiesSection (see the LiveStrategiesSection bug). Decide one home for live runs and remove the duplication.

title: Deploy-readiness check (keys / broker / no blocking eval)
description: §7.2 slice-3 candidate: 'safe to go live? keys ✓ broker ✓ no blocking eval ✗' panel. Composes existing provider/broker/eval state.

title: Capital-risk strip (deployed capital, drawdown, daily-loss-limit buffer)
description: §7.2 non-negotiable for live money. BLOCKED: live portfolio PnL is not in dashboard tables (execution layer + Alpaca only; no /api/portfolio). Needs operator decision on data path (daemon proxy vs persisted snapshots) per §7.4(1) — resolved as LIVE-via-SSE, but the live route still needs building.

title: Cost rollup strip (optimizer + evals + runs vs budget cap)
description: §4.7/§7.2: no aggregate 'spend since you were last here / this week' anywhere, for a system that spends autonomously overnight. Needs cross-source cost aggregation (optimizer cycle cost + eval/agent-run token cost).

title: ActiveTasksStrip: ETA, cancel-gate to human-queued, runaway-agent >24h warning
description: Spec P2/§7.1: show real progress+ETA (only if real); render Cancel only on human-queued evals not optimizer-queued (needs RunSummary.source field — backend); warn on live runs >24h without operator check-in. Stuck-queue >2h already done.

title: Time-window pills (Today/7d/30d/All) + list-endpoint time filters
description: Cross-cutting §4/§7.2: no time-window scoping exists; no list endpoint supports a time filter. Add an inline pill row scoping outcomes + findings; backend: add time filters to eval/runs (+ agent-runs) list endpoints.

title: OptimizerDigestStrip: baseline acceptance rate + holdout deltas + cost-vs-budget
description: Spec P4 reshape (§7.1): kept/dropped needs a 30d rolling baseline to spot degradation; show holdout deltas; cost needs budget context ('$4.10 / $10 today') + anomaly flag. Depends on optimizer endpoints.

title: D1-7: Pill disabled state
description: components/primitives/Pill.tsx gains disabled prop (opacity-40 pointer-events-none aria-disabled). Spec: D1-7.
close_reason: disabled prop (opacity-40 pointer-events-none aria-disabled) + 3 tests. Commit pending.

title: Remove LiveCycleView from OptimizerHome (Level 2 IA fix)
description: The Optimizer home page embeds two independent status displays: StatusHero (optimizer session state) and LiveCycleView (eval cycle SSE events). These show contradictory state — 'Optimizer → Idle' + 'Live · cycle in progress' — because they track different subsystems. Fix: remove LiveCycleView from OptimizerHome, wire Pause/Cancel/Resume buttons (currently disabled no-ops), add 'Watch live →' link to RunDetail when session is active.
close_reason: PR #855 merged — LiveCycleView hidden when optimizer active, controls wired, Watch live link added

title: PR B: filter DSL nesting + warmup validator + mark-to-market
description: Engine changes. (1) B2/F19: add nested condition group support to xvision-filters (types/validate/parse/runtime). (2) B3/F18: add per-indicator warmup check to xvn eval validate — warn when indicator lookback exceeds scenario bars. (3) I3: close open positions at scenario end in backtest executor and include in metrics/win_rate.
close_reason: PR B created: #857 feat/harness-filter-nesting-warmup-mtm. All 5 work units committed and adversarially reviewed PASS.

title: PR A: wake_when_in_position help text + skill updates

(2) Update xvision-cli and xvision-cli-qa skills: warmup table, prompt-gate reliability note, tools gotcha, chain lockfile guidance.

title: Harness improvements: filter nesting, warmup validator, mark-to-market, docs
description: Two-PR wave from the 2026-06-08 Ollama session report. PR A: wake_when_in_position help text + skill updates (I2+I4). PR B: filter DSL nested condition groups (B2/F19) + rvol_tod_20 warmup validator (B3/F18) + mark-to-market at scenario end (I3). All engine changes require TDD.

title: Overnight eval → harness improvements QA plan (CLI/WEBUI/SKILLS)
description: The overnight eval agent produced findings across two sources: (1) xvnej user-interaction mining (F1-F7: real user session 2026-06-02/03) and (2) autooptimizer run-7 (Gemini 3.1 flash-lite, most findings resolved in PRs #813-829). Turn these into actionable improvements organized by surface (CLI, WEBUI, SKILLS, HARNESS), and turn the control tower evaluation spec (2026-06-07-control-tower-dashboard-evaluation.md) into an actionable QA list with evidence required per item.

title: S1-W1: Safety-pause banner (home-page)
description: Add SafetyPauseBanner component as first element in HomeRoute content. Renders full-width red strip when SafetyStateResponse.paused===true. Existing SafetyPauseBadge in Topbar stays unchanged.
close_reason: Implemented: SafetyPauseBanner component + tests, mounted in HomeRoute. Spec+quality reviewed.

title: Control Tower: cockpit home page overhaul (3 slices)
description:
Overhaul the dashboard home page from a setup-completeness panel to an operator cockpit. Based on approved spec docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-07-control-tower-dashboard-evaluation.md (passed 3-reviewer adversarial gate 2026-06-07).

Why this issue exists: The current home page surfaces config nags and recent runs. The design spec (2026-05-10) and post-optimizer reality (2026-06-07) both require an operations re-entry panel that surfaces: what's making money, what's in motion, what needs attention, and what the Optimizer did overnight. The 'LIVE strategy' surface (real money vs paper evals) is explicitly missing.

3-slice structure (sequential, slice 2 depends on optimizer-ui-overhaul P1-P5 landing):
- Slice 1 (frontend-only): Cockpit home — Active tasks, critical findings, per-strategy outcomes, safety banner, live strategies section, nag strip demotion, remove count cards.
- Slice 2 (new backend): Optimizer digest strip + agent-runs list endpoint + active-cycle endpoint + live strategies list page (/live route).
- Slice 3 (backend-first): Verified outcomes header with capital-risk strip (PnL data path via live SSE per operator decision 2026-06-07), time-window filters, deploy-readiness check.

What needs to be done: Implement per the spec's §7.3 tracer slices, adding a dedicated live strategy view (separate from paper evals) as specified by operator on 2026-06-07.
close_reason: S1 PR #851 and S2 PR #852 created. S3 (capital-risk, time-window, deploy-readiness) deferred per plan — needs live SSE infrastructure to mature.

title: Fix HOLD+exit_reason action display: show actual closing action
description: When exit_reason is present (stop_loss, take_profit, etc.) and the model said HOLD, the action column should show the actual closing action (SELL for long close, CLOSE for short cover) not HOLD. Also: short entries should show SHORT not SELL.
close_reason: Closed

title: Remove No-op filter pill from Decisions table
description: The FILTERED/No-op pill in the decisions table action filter row should be removed. Filtered rows aren't real decisions and the pill adds clutter.
close_reason: Closed

title: Remove agent role input from strategy composer UI
description: The 'New agent role' text field gates the Create-and-attach button in the strategy authoring page. Remove the field entirely; auto-generate the role from the agent name (kebab-case). Also remove the role display from attached-agent rows since it adds noise.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement Signal drop-down menu system
description: Build the Signal menu system as shown in the Signal Menus design PDF. The design specifies a unified dropdown surface for action menus (⋯ overflow), sort selects, model pickers, and checkbox filters. Currently the app has no floating dropdown components — the strategy row uses plain text buttons (Clone / Inspector →), the sort control uses a native <select>, and the model picker is a native <select>. All need upgrading to the new Signal-styled custom dropdowns.
close_reason: Implemented in PR #837 (feat/signal-menus): SignalMenu.tsx primitive with 4 variants, icon additions, strategies ⋯ action menu, ListToolbar sort/filter upgrade to custom dropdowns, ModelPickerDropdown

title: Align Optimizer and ChatRail model pickers
description: Implement the planned model-picker/defaults work: Optimizer run controls must use the standard provider/model pick list including no-auth providers, launch from visible picker state instead of stale localStorage, expose clear config fallback/default copy, fix reviewer-provider provenance, and add the ChatRail parity follow-up coverage.
close_reason: completed

title: Deploy xvision image to xvn-app and xvnej
description: Build the xvision Docker image locally from the current main checkout, transfer it over SSH to both xvn-app and xvnej, and redeploy/recreate the Docker services on each host.
acceptance_criteria: Local image build succeeds; image is transferred to xvn-app; xvn-app service is redeployed; image is transferred to xvnej; xvnej service is redeployed; running containers use the newly built image digest
close_reason: Built xvision:deploy-beaf0e6 locally, loaded it on root@100.120.48.1, and recreated both xvn-app and xvnej-app healthy on the new image.

title: Normalize local provider Cline base URLs
description: Cline runtime calls for local providers should receive OpenAI-compatible /v1 roots while stored provider catalog/check URLs remain native where needed. Covers Ollama, llama.cpp, LM Studio heuristics, and preserves vLLM configured behavior.
acceptance_criteria: ProviderKind::Ollama native root maps to /v1 for Cline; ProviderKind::LlamaCpp native root maps to /v1 for Cline; OpenaiCompat localhost Ollama/LM Studio heuristics map native roots to /v1; vLLM configured base URL remains unchanged; provider catalog/check logic is not modified
close_reason: Merged in PR #831

title: Flaky test: eval_runs_retry::retry_creates_new_run_for_completed_source_without_sibling
description: crates/xvision-dashboard/tests/eval_runs_retry.rs::retry_creates_new_run_for_completed_source_without_sibling passes in isolation on both main and the PR #902 branch but fails under the concurrent full --no-fail-fast suite run, indicating order-dependence / shared DB state across tests in the binary. Pre-existing (not introduced by #902). Isolate test state (per-test temp DB) or serialize. Surfaced during #902 baseline diff.

title: fix(autooptimizer): --mock help text only mentions paper tester but also stubs mutator+judge
description: The RunCycleArgs and MutateOnceArgs --mock flag help text says 'Use deterministic stub paper tester (no API keys). Safe for smoke testing.' — but --mock also stubs the LLM dispatch used by the Mutator and Judge via MockDispatch::echo(canned). The runtime warning also only mentions paper-test metrics. Misleading docs cause operators to misunderstand the scope of --mock.
close_reason: Closed

title: D2-3: active:scale-[0.96] on primary CTAs
description: Add active:scale-[0.96] press feedback to all primary buttons. Spec D2-3.
close_reason: active:scale-[0.96] applied to 26 solid-gold/accent CTAs across 21 files; typecheck+build green

title: [bug] scenarios.test: optimizer source-filter combobox query fails on origin/main
description: Pre-existing failure (not from D1-1). 'excludes optimizer scenarios by default...' test at scenarios.test.tsx:187 fails: getAllByRole('combobox') returns 0 — the source filter <select> isn't present/rendered in the test. Confirmed failing on pristine origin/main during D1 work. Out of scope for D1 a11y; needs separate triage.

title: Optimizer: allow structural filter mutation (add/create a filter) when base.filter is None
description: QA 2026-06-08: filter mutation only applies when base.filter.is_some() (the typed AST is walked for numeric thresholds). A strategy with no filter that makes too few/many trades cannot be helped by the optimizer's filter lever. Follow-up: let the experiment-writer ADD a filter (structural mutation), not just tune an existing one. Bigger scope than xvision-avg (which fixes lever rotation for existing filters/prompts).

title: Fix deploy-image cleanup for Docker ps format compatibility
description: During a local-image deployment on 2026-06-06, scripts/deploy-image.sh loaded the new image successfully but its post-load cleanup emitted: failed to execute template at <.ImageID>: can't evaluate field ImageID in type *formatter.ContainerContext. The script then attempted to remove xvision:deploy-beaf0e6 and Docker correctly refused because xvnej-app still referenced the old image. The cleanup logic should use a Docker CLI-compatible way to detect container image IDs across installed Docker versions before selecting old xvision tags for removal.
acceptance_criteria: Post-load cleanup identifies containers referencing the prior image without using unsupported docker ps template fields; cleanup skips tags still referenced by any container; deploy-image.sh completes without cleanup template errors on root@100.120.48.1's Docker version.

title: QA: Move Strategies back button above list
description: Strategy page side bar layout reduces page width. Move the Strategies back button above the list rather than keeping it in the side bar layout.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in worktree codex/qa-list
